data.content:
All 5 integration tests passed. The command to run only `Category=Integration` tests is:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the VSTest `--filter` option with the trait name `Category` and value `Integration`. All 5 matching tests succeeded.
